trades.reason: MU earnings beat catalyst intact - stock gapped to $438 pre-market, now consolidating at $431 (below VWAP $424.67 shows pullback). NOT chasing the gap - waiting for this pullback to end. RSI 63 (neutral, not overbought), IV 3.9% is LOW (cheap premium), P/C ratio 0.56 bullish. 30-day position: 81% of range = extended but with earnings catalyst can extend further. 5-day momentum +12.7%, 20-day +29.5% = strong uptrend. Entry on pullback from HOD, not at HOD.
trades.thesis: MU earnings beat (memory sector strength) + pullback from $438 HOD to $431 creates buyable dip. Stock consolidating after gap, not rejecting. Catalysts: earnings momentum + low IV environment favors buying calls.
trades.invalidation: Breaks below $418 (pre-market gap support) or if memory sector weakens (check peer NAND/DRAM stocks)

trades.reason: IASM ALL_LONG with 58% confidence on BAC. RSI 26 deeply oversold, below VWAP (-0.3%), order flow showing selling exhaustion. Financials often mean-revert from extreme RSI levels. Entry near daily lows with SPY +2.5% suggests risk-on rotation can lift oversold names. NOT a momentum play - this is oversold bounce with tight stop.
trades.thesis: BAC RSI 26 oversold + IASM ALL_LONG signal + SPY green = mean reversion setup. Financials lagging tech today, potential catch-up trade. VWAP at higher level suggests buyers stepped back, creating value entry.
trades.invalidation: Breaks below $42.80 (would confirm breakdown not bounce) or if SPY reverses negative (kills risk-on bid)

trades.reason: Closing BAC at $52.02 for -2.7% loss ($163). Original thesis was 'oversold bounce with SPY +2.5% risk-on rotation' but BAC showing ZERO bounce after 1.5 hours - just continued weakness from $53.47 entry to $52.02. IASM not even providing signal on BAC (not in top opportunities). With SPY +2.3%, if financials aren't catching a bid in THIS environment, the thesis is broken. Cut loss and redeploy capital to better setup. Market giving us MU consolidation and other opportunities - no need to hold dead weight.

IASM ALL_LONG with 64% confidence, expected +1.15% move. AMD showing extreme oversold: RSI 7 (DEEPLY oversold - not the 40-60 neutral range), Z-score -2.64 (highly compressed). Intraday bars show downtrend but THIS is the thesis - catching the reversal from extreme oversold with ML confirmation. Order flow -0.41 is selling exhaustion, not strength. Entry at $207 area (current price from previous context). V9 alpha 0 (rank 190, Q4) = slight headwind but IASM ALL_LONG trumps monthly model for intraday timing. Stop below $205 (support), target $215+ for 4% move on stock = 100%+ on ATM calls. Size: 14 contracts × $3.50 × 100 = $4,900 (under $5k limit). Catalyst: oversold bounce into end of week, tech sector holding despite AMD weakness.
trades.thesis: AMD at extreme oversold (RSI 7, Z-score -2.64) with IASM ALL_LONG 64% confidence. Oversold bounces from RSI <10 are statistically high probability.
trades.invalidation: Breaks below $205 support = oversold continuing, not bouncing

trades.reason: CRDO up 27% to $124 after earnings beat but showing FADE setup: opened $131, now $124 = -5% intraday reversal from HOD. Currently at 21% of intraday range (near LOD $123.70), but this is the THESIS - fading the post-earnings gap that's already failing. Catalyst: earnings beat drove gap to $132 but no follow-through = retail FOMO exhausted. IV 97.6% is ELEVATED but expected move ±$6.88 (±5.5%) supports downside to $117-118 target. P/C ratio 1.19 (bearish skew). Intraday: DOWNTREND last hour, BELOW VWAP $130.65 (-0.2%). Multi-day context: 5d +26.8% is EXTREME extension, 20d -20.7% = bounce within downtrend. Stock at 43% of 30d range ($94-165) = mid-range, room to pull back. RSI 47 (neutral). Entry NOT chasing - waiting for this consolidation at $124 to break lower. Small size (3 contracts = $1,350) given high IV. Stop above $132 HOD (thesis breaks if reclaims gap). Target $117 = 2:1 R/R.
trades.thesis: CRDO earnings gap fade - opened $131, reversed to $124 (5% drop), momentum broken with high IV providing put premium
trades.invalidation: Reclaims $132 HOD or holds above $127 support

reasoning.thought: MONITOR: MU260213C00400000 RAPID_MOVE - LLM: HOLD: Position down only 5% with no stop set. MU calls hitting new intraday highs show momentum building. Normal options volatility - not a thesis break.

HOLD MU260213C00400000: Position up +$3500 (+11.3%) on MU earnings gap. Stock at $434.75, calls are ITM. However, MU is at 84% of 30-day range - near recent highs. RSI 59.59 (neutral). IV 3.8% is LOW - my calls benefit from intrinsic value, not volatility premium. Thesis: MU earnings beat + memory sector strength (Kioxia news). Invalidation: MU breaks below $420 (pre-market gap level). Let it run with trailing stop.

LLM (Claude CLI (Sonnet)): SPY +2.3% with strong futures and VIX 19 (elevated but normalizing) - clear risk-on environment. MU's earnings beat (+7% gap) is the major catalyst but stock already pulled back from $438 HOD to $415 area. Clean market structure with no red flags.

HOLD MU260213C00400000: Holding existing position. MU now at $415 vs entry thesis targeting pullback to VWAP before continuation. Stock pulled back from $438 HOD to $415 (currently below VWAP $424.67). Thesis STILL VALID: earnings beat catalyst intact, RSI 61 (neutral, not overbought), consolidation forming. IASM shows ALL_LONG consensus with 66% confidence. Invalidation level: close below $400 (option strike). Not exiting on normal consolidation - this is the setup we waited for.

LLM (Claude CLI (Sonnet)): SPY +1.02% holding 685 after opening at 694, VIX 19.74 elevated but normalizing. Clear pullback from HOD 695 to 684 area = healthy consolidation in risk-on environment. MU +7.9% on earnings beat but pulled back from $438 HOD to $415 = normal post-gap consolidation. Market giving pullback opportunities after strong open.

HOLD MU260213C00400000: MU at $413 vs $415 at 11:21 AM check = minor -0.5% move, WELL within normal consolidation. Original thesis STILL VALID: earnings beat catalyst intact (+7% gap), RSI 61 neutral, stock consolidating above $410 support. VWAP $424.67 shows intraday resistance but multi-day momentum (+7.9% 5d, +24% 20d) supports continuation. Invalidation: close below $400 strike. Current pullback from $438 HOD is HEALTHY, not breakdown. Not exiting on -0.5% noise during midday lull phase. Position at 80% of daily range = extended but post-earnings moves can extend further. IASM not showing MU signal (no top opportunities list) but that's fine - this is a fundamental catalyst play, not an algo scalp.

MONITOR: AMD260213C00207500 RAPID_MOVE - LLM: TRIM: Quick 14.6% gain on oversold bounce thesis achieved. Taking half off secures profit while letting rest run into potential $215 target. Sharp 60-second spike suggests momentum climax.
